appliedUpdates.description: Documented the temporary local repo plus bare remote integration-test pattern and first-push postconditions for git CLI workflows in .factory/library/architecture.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the tauri-fullstack skill to explicitly document the temporary local repo + bare remote fixture pattern for git CLI workflow tests and to name first-push postconditions like upstream tracking, `commits_pushed`, and `has_remote` that those tests must assert.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Shared-state observations from smart-push, fix-ship-integration-tests, and fix-ship-push-tracking-and-tests all point to the same omission, and prior scrutiny failures in those features were corrected only after follow-up fixes added/adjusted those assertions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify in tauri-fullstack that verification-only or non-visual fixes may skip browser verification and Rust-first TDD when the feature scope is limited to already-landed code review or small frontend config migrations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Shared-state observations from ai-settings-simplify and fix-gemini-config-migration both noted that the current skill wording over-prescribes implementation/browser steps for verification-only and frontend-only config work, leading workers to record avoidable procedure deviations.

rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because this is isolated fixture drift rather than shared operational knowledge or milestone-blocking guidance; it can be fixed in normal product work if needed.
